Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' activities that are followed by 'Completed + Resolved' within the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' out of all 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' compared to the frequency of 'Accepted + Wait - User'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' out of all 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Percentage of cases where 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' occurs at least once among all cases ending in 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Ratio of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' to 'Accepted + In Progress' across the entire event log
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' out of all 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Number of distinct process variants that include the sequence 'Accepted + In Progress → Accepted + Wait - Customer'
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' activities for cases where activity 'Accepted + In Progress' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' occurrences that are not followed by any further waiting states (e.g., 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor', 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation')
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' out of all cases where 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' does not happen

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' in high-impact cases (impact = 'High') versus low-impact cases (impact = 'Low')
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' activities that occur before the first occurrence of 'Completed + In Call' in relevant cases
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Number of times 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' is directly preceded by 'Accepted + In Progress' in the same case
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' activities for cases where activity 'Accepted + In Progress' occurs

Name: Percentage of all 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' events that belong to cases ultimately resolved as 'Completed + Closed'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' out of all 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' relative to the total number of waiting-type activities (e.g., 'Accepted + Wait - User', 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor', 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation', 'Accepted + Wait')
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' out of all 'Accepted + Wait - User'
